title: InferenceJob
description: Schema for inference job messages passed between Rust backend and Python worker via Redis Streams. This contract ensures type-safe communication across language boundaries.

job_id.description: Unique identifier for this inference job (UUIDv4)

image_id.description: Reference to the submitted image. In current implementation, this is a simulated ID. Future: S3/MinIO object key.

model_type.description: Model to use for inference. Stage 1 models: patchcore, padim, winclip. Stage 2 model: pushpull (requires labeled data).

stage.description: Pipeline stage. 1 = Unsupervised/Zero-shot detection. 2 = Supervised classification (requires AL labels).

priority.description: Job priority (0 = lowest, 10 = highest). Higher priority jobs are processed first.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for tracking and debugging

batch_id.description: If part of batch submission, the batch identifier

callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL for result notification
